## Description
<!-- Describe your changes -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] New infrastructure resource
- [ ] Modification to existing resource
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Bug fix

## Security Checklist
- [ ] All resources have required tags (Environment, Owner, CostCenter)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Encryption enabled for data at rest
- [ ] Network access follows least privilege
- [ ] Security scanning passes (Checkov, tfsec, OPA)

## Testing
- [ ] `terraform plan` runs successfully
- [ ] Changes reviewed for security implications
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots of security scan results -->
